title: Gull Lake Vice II: The Delusion Continues
original_title: Gull Lake Vice II: The Delusion Continues
overview: In this second and unneeded installment, the Delusion is so Strong that Brandon and Elliot Find themselves in a Real Narrative Film as Two Washed-up Vice Cops Resurrected from Retirement and Assigned to take down a Dangerous group of Criminals Dealing Drugs, Distributing Guns and Trafficking Women around the Gull Lake area.
